channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 ‘DMZ First Look’ video
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

A 39-minute deployment into the Exclusion Zone.

Publisher Activision and developer Infinity Ward have released a 39-minute video showcasing Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4‘s extraction shooter mode “DMZ.”

As detailed yesterday, DMZ combines story-driven missions, side operations, looting and crafting systems, a player-driven Bounty system, and a “deep” progression system, all built for replayability.

Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Microsoft Store, and Battle.net on October 23.

Watch the video below.

DMZ First Look



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/call-of-duty-modern-warfare-4-dmz-first-look-video
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 ‘World Update 22: U.S. National Parks’ launches July 4
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS VR2
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

National Championship Air Races coming this fall.

Publisher Xbox Game Studios and developer Asobo Studio will release “World Update 22” for Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 on July 4, which will feature over thirty United States National Parks and monuments, as well as the Goodyear Blimp, the companies announced.

Later this fall, players will be able to take to the skies over New Mexico with the in-game release of the National Championship Air Races.

Here are the details:

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 introduces an unprecedented level of detail to over 30 US national parks with the free World Update 22: US National Parks. Over 400,000 square kilometers of parks have been added, including parks from 12 states (Arizona, California, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, North Dakota, Oregon, South Dakota, Texas, Utah, Washington, and Wyoming).

Later this fall, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 will add the fastest motorsport in the world, the National Championship Air Races, covering the historic racetrack in Reno, Nevada and the new track in Roswell, New Mexico. This free update includes the Jet Class, Biplane Class, T-6 Class, the famous Unlimited Class… and the exciting STOL Drag Class.

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is the latest installment in the Microsoft Flight Simulator franchise. It is the most ambitious consumer flight simulator ever produced, featuring the largest, most diverse and detailed fleet of aircraft, the most complete representation of airports and air traffic, and the most visually stunning rendition of Earth ever created. Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 goes beyond merely operating the aircraft; it allows simmers to pursue their dream of an aviation career. The sky is calling!

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

World Update 22: U.S. National Parks Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/microsoft-flight-simulator-2024-world-update-22-us-national-parks-launches-july-4
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Narrative-driven first-person action game Magicians: The Devil’s Deal announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

From Focus Entertainment and Uppercut Games.

Publisher Focus Entertainment and developer Uppercut Games have announced Magicians: The Devil’s Deal, a narrative-driven first-person action game where magic is real. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store in 2027. It will also be available via Game Pass.

Here is an overview of the game, via Focus Entertainment:

About

Magicians: The Devil’s Deal is a narrative-driven first-person shooter where stage magic becomes real. You play as Jacob Menteuro, a fallen illusionist bound by a pact with The Devil and cast into Hell. Master deadly tricks, steal the powers of rival magicians, and escape the infernal world of Theatreland.

Magic is More Than Spectacle. It is Power.

Step into a world where stage magic becomes real. In Magicians: The Devil’s Deal, every ability shapes how you fight, adapt, and survive, as you face powerful enemies in a twisted world built on illusion and control.

Power, Illusion, and Deception

In this first-person tale, magic has broken free from the stage and shattered the world. Play as Jacob Menteuro, a celebrated stage magician whose talent bordered on the supernatural. Cast into Hell, he is trapped in Theatreland, a twisted domain ruled by the rivals who betrayed him: the Masters. Bound by a treacherous pact with the Devil, Jacob must survive this infernal stage where performance is power, and deception is survival.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Become the Ultimate Trickster

As you descend through Theatreland, discover powerful abilities that expand your control and precision. Stage magic is more than a weapon. It becomes a lethal discipline as cards turn into razor‑sharp projectiles, chains ensnare your enemies, and gravity itself bends to your will. Each Realm is ruled by powerful Masters and filled with relentless fanatics and nightmarish performers. Every encounter demands observation, adaptation, and mastery, pushing you to turn spectacle into dominance and fully embrace the role of the ultimate trickster.

Take Your Revenge. Escape if You Can!

Betrayed by his peers, hounded by his mentor and compelled by The Devil himself, Jacob hunts the Masters across Theatreland to steal their powers and uncover the truth behind their treachery. In a world ruled by hubris and temptation, his revenge offers no way out, only a deeper pull toward darkness.

A Twisted Stage Awaits

Theatreland is an infernal reflection of Victorian London buried in the depths of Hell. Explore realms erupting with the twisted powers of their Masters. Nothing in Theatreland is ever what it seems, and every scene tells a story shaped by performance and deception.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/narrative-driven-first-person-action-game-magicians-the-devils-deal-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse launches October 15 for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC, later in 2026 for Switch
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Pre-orders available now in standard and Midnight editions.

Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on October 15, followed by Switch later in 2026, publisher Konami and developers Evil Empire and Motion Twin announced

Pre-orders are available now in the following editions:

  • Standard Edition ($29.99 / £24.99 / €29.99 / ¥3,850)
    • A copy of the game
  • Midnight Edition ($39.99 / £34.99 / €39.99 / ¥4,950)
    • A copy of the game
    • Digital Sound and Art Gallery
    • Bonuses (in-game items)
      • Trevor Style Costume
      • Sypha Style Costume
      •  Family’s Grace (Relic)

Pre-orders for both edition will include the bonus in-game item “Alucard Style Costume.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Konami:

About

Medieval Paris, Where the Tolling Bells Herald the End

1499. Paris is engulfed in flames as monstrous creatures suddenly emerge from the shadows.

Trevor Belmont, the hero who defeated Dracula, ventures into the burning streets with his daughter, Rose Belmont. Armed with the legendary holy whip, the Vampire Killer, they hunt down the beasts bleeding from the looming castle.

Rose is soon swept up in the dark conspiracy that lurks beneath. Will she succeed in saving Paris from devastation?

Key Features

  • Satisfying Whip Action
    • Castlevania‘s iconic whip action is more satisfying than ever!
    • Crack your whip to move around freely like a trapeze artist!
    • Master the whip mechanics and be creative to pounce on your prey like a wolf in fast-paced combat!
  • Diverse Bosses and the Arcana System
    • Face-off against legendary bosses including Death, Medusa and Carmilla in addition to enigmatic new bosses such as Joan of Arc.
    • Once defeated, bosses are sealed into Rose’s tarot cards, turning them into Arcana – use their skills to cast spells and obtain unique special actions
  • Customize Your Battle Style with Weapons and Relics
    • Customize Rose’s battle style by using a variety of equipment, including weapons spanning seven distinct categories and Relics that trigger powerful effects through both offense and defense.
    • Combine equipment you discover through exploration to create your own playstyle!
  • Iconic Castlevania Atmosphere, Reimagined in New Stages
    • From iconic Gothic aesthetics to vivid, refined visuals, the game presents a fresh take on the world of Castlevania.
    • Explore maps filled with both new features and familiar elements inspired by classic Castlevania titles.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/castlevania-belmonts-curse-launches-october-15-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc-later-in-2026-for-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Valheim launches September 9
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

Viking survival game leaving Early Access after five years.

Viking survival game Valheim will leave Early Access and launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Xbox One, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on September 9, Coffee Stain Publishing and developer Iron Gate announced.

Valheim first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on February 2, 2021, followed by Xbox Series, Xbox One, and PC via Microsoft Store on March 14, 2023.

“When we set out on this journey back in 2021, we could hardly imagine the amount of players that would dive in, and the size of the community that would form around the game,” said Iron Gate creative director Robin Eyre in a press release. “Approaching 1.0 feels equal parts exciting and anxious as we’ve worked hard to make Deep North a worthy conclusion to the Valheim journey!”

Here are the latest details, via Coffee Stain Publishing:

Deep North: Glacial Peaks and Frozen Tundras

Deep North is Valheim‘s final biome wrought with ancient evils and lurking threats. What at first seems like a picturesque postcard is bound to quickly turn into a struggle to survive as the land awakens to banish any invaders trying to set foot on its icy shores.

When players first arrive in the Deep North, they are likely to be greeted by an impenetrable snowstorm that, once it clears out, reveals snowy mesas and fields frozen in eternal stillness. As they carefully begin to explore, they will discover vast but abandoned villages, quickly realizing that they aren’t the first vikings to set foot here.

  • ❮
  • ❯

The northernmost biome is home to some of the most ancient threats players will find in the game. When the trolls of Valheim grow too old, they migrate to the Deep North to become one with the land and transform into Gammeltrolls, primordial giants that serve as the guardians of the north.

While the surface might seem desolate, the underground of the Deep North teems with life. Vikings who have previously set foot here have been attacked and defeated by the malicious Elakingar, who dig tunnels deep into the ground. Adventurers should tread carefully however, for these sinister devils are at times accompanied by something far more terrifying.

Across Realms and Platforms

With the official release of Valheim into 1.0, the game will be coming out on PlayStation 5 and Nintendo Switch 2 as well, on top of already being available on PC, Linux, Mac, Xbox One and Xbox Series XIS. Valheim will feature full cross-play between platforms, allowing players from all corners of the world to experience the tenth norse realm however and with whomever they’d like.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Version 1.0 and “Deep North” Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/valheim-launches-september-9
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Outward 2 open beta test now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Sample the dangerous and exciting world of Aurai.

An open beta test for adventure RPG Outward 2 is now available for PC via Steam Nine Dots Publishing and developer Nine Dots Studio announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Nine Dots Studio:

About

This July, Outward 2 will usher players into Aurai, an unforgiving world that is gentle to no one. You are no prophesized savior with some innate power to carry you to glory. The definitive adventure simulator casts players as ordinary adventurers, where critical thinking and preparation are the only tickets to grand experiences. Drop your backpack before combat so that you’re able to move freely. Scout out a dangerous creature’s path and lay traps to weaken it before the killing blow. Every decision matters and consequences are real. Even death is no respite, as this only turns the page to the chapter where you must pick yourself up from the mud, find your backpack, and continue your journey with renewed vigor and insight.

Key Features

  • An Average Joe on a Remarkable Journey – You’re not a hero of legend. Shape your modest and meager beginnings through three distinct starting scenarios and eleven backgrounds, which will determine where to start in this brutal world. If you’re knocked out, your journey continues, and you must live with the consequences.
  • A Living, Evolving World – A full-year seasonal cycle transforms the world of Aurai and its four distinct areas. Regions will feature their own biomes, seasons, and specific gameplay.
  • Growth Through Mastery – Every factor in Outward 2 molds your playstyle. Your tactical choices as a player, from the weight and material of your armor to particular weapons you use, are reinforced by the new Exercise system, where passive skills will spark and grow based on how you play. Seek out special trainers scattered around Aurai, who will teach you how to survive the most brutal encounters for a fee.
  • Ritual Spellcasting and Tactical Combat – Cast spells through rituals, like sending a fire stone into the air to create a ring around you that allows you to empower your skills with deadly flames. Challenging combat, where every weapon has its own distinct moveset, is further enhanced in the sequel with a larger variety of tools and weapon combinations, along with animations that bring more fluidity and control to players. Major combat improvements were cultivated based on extensive player feedback from the original.
  • Intentional Inventory Management -Your backpack is your lifeline, and every space within is worth its weight in gold. Pack provisions, potions, weapons, and camping gear for an expedition, but manage it carefully as you gather more along the way, though not all will be worth taking up space. In a fight, you may want to drop your backpack to attack and evade more deftly. The sequel adds a mule you may earn to carry your wares throughout your journey, but its vulnerability may influence your path as well. Weigh each decision carefully.
  • Two-Player Split-Screen and Online Cooperative Play – Aurai is a grueling place, but you mustn’t go alone. Plan and prepare alongside a friend, covering each other’s weaknesses and marrying your strengths. Teamwork expands the opportunities and options for tackling the many challenges you will face in Outward 2.

Outward 2 is due out in Early Access for PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG on July 7.

Watch a new trailer below.

Open Beta Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/outward-2-open-beta-test-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Citizen Sleeper creator announces first-person ‘fungalpunk’ RPG Signet City for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Fellow Traveller and Citizen Sleeper series developer Jump Over the Age have announced Signet City, a first-person “fungalpunk” RPG. It will be available for PC via Steam, GOG, and Humble Store. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Fellow Traveller:

About

You are a parasite.

From the creator of Citizen Sleeper, Signet City is a first-person fungalpunk RPG. You are a parasite, in a city where strange technologies and radical ideas are taking root. Grow into and through its inhabitants, uncover and change their stories, and witness the terminal season of the signet city.

Key Features

  • First-Person Fungalpunk RPG – Experience a narrative RPG from a completely new perspective. Go behind the eyes of your hosts and change their fate, one pivotal day at a time.
  • A City Seeded With Stories – The Signet City is in crisis, its citizens trapped in a vortex of ecological collapse, governmental overreach and strange, rampant technologies. Witness their struggle as both tensions and waters rise.
  • A Dark Dream of the 1980s – Inspired by the turbulent 1980’s of the UK and the iconic industrial cities of the North, Signet City is a post-punk fever dream unlike anything you have seen before.
  • Drowned in Ink and Grain – Handcrafted by developer Jump Over the Age, and drawing on black and white documentary photography, screentoned manga, and pen and ink drawings, this city pulses with monochrome beauty.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/citizen-sleeper-creator-announces-first-person-fungalpunk-rpg-signet-city-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Stronghold 4 announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Firefly Studios has announced real-time strategy / city builder sequel Stronghold 4 for PC (Steam). It will launch in 2026. A demo will launch on June 23.

“Back in 2001, we were up against [Grand Theft Auto III] and yet I’m told we somehow still managed to sell more PC copies in Germany,” said Firefly Studios studio head Nick Tannahill in a press release. “Now with [Grand Theft Auto VI] and Stronghold 4 both coming out in 2026, it’s almost like the rematch of the century!”

  • ❮
  • ❯

About

Stronghold 4 is the long-awaited next entry in the award-winning real-time strategy / city builder Stronghold series. Step into the peasant shoes of Penryn and experience a gripping prequel narrative set in the series’ roots of medieval England. Feel the impact of a living medieval world on your castle economy and siegecraft, as you battle against hostile outlaws, rival lords and the very elements themselves.

Set well before the events of the original Stronghold and headlined by Ben Starr and Samantha Beart, follow the tale of Penryn as his simple shepherd’s life is upended and he is forced on a journey full of death and daring!

The Early Access launch will feature a 22-mission story campaign, full Skirmish Trail, Free Build and Custom Skirmish with 8 CPU opponents. Online multiplayer, an economic campaign and a co-op trail are coming later on.

This latest title sees the Stronghold series take the technical leap to Unreal Engine 5, expanding the possibilities for the simulation of castle life, realism and atmosphere to unprecedented levels. Reclaiming the series’ roots of medieval England, the game has been designed so players will feel the impact of a living medieval world on their castle economy and siegecraft, as they battle against hostile outlaws, rival lords and the very elements themselves.

Immerse yourself in the cutting-edge visuals and gritty reality of medieval life, from snow hindering crop growth and heavy rain reducing archery range, to deadly castle traps and constructions. Destruction and danger may come from within or without, so prepare and adapt as best as possible!

Seek out Penryn destiny alongside a cast of new and returning characters, as you manifest this humble peasant’s potential and lead his forces in search of glory and knighthood. Starring inspired performances by Ben Starr, Samantha Beart, Walles Hamonde, and Harry McEntire.

Combining classic real-time strategy and city-building gameplay with crisp visuals and contemporary quality of life additions, Stronghold 4 aims to capture the spirit of classic strategy games together with the modern features and options that players expect.

This includes enhanced medieval war mechanics, elaborate economic management, new in-game events, influential weather shifts and more. All this playing out across larger-than-ever maps, with the bloody sieges and grand warfare of Stronghold feeling more epic than ever before!

Your Stronghold awaits…

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/stronghold-4-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Multiplayer turn-based roguelike game Another Door announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher No More Robots and developer Mizar & Alcor Interactive have announced Another Door, a multiplayer turn-based roguelike game. It will launch for PC via Steam in 2026. A demo is available now.

Here is an overview of the game, via No More Robots:

About

Another Door is a a multiplayer, turn-based roguelike filled with monsters, despair, risk and betrayal.

Travel through Another Door as friends or enemies for a party game where no two rounds are ever the same. Choose cards and risk your soul across tons of monster encounters, win prizes and fight for survival. You’ll need to be clever and bluff for your survival, as not every friend is truly on your side.

Hide your intentions, bluff to survive and bet on your luck. Will you back out, or venture through Another Door?

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Hidden Choices and Well-Guarded Intentions – Play with up to four players online or on the same screen while keeping your choices secret
  • Risks and Rewards – Come face to face with desperate creatures, and risk it all in the hope of obtaining more gems
  • Control Unique Powers – From dragon’s skin to gifts from Mother, find boons and curses throughout to build your path out of the nightmare
  • Multiple Choices – Every encounter is a source of tragic decisions. You’ll have to make the right choice at the right time. Will you be smarter than your companions in misfortune?
  • Forced Friendships – Your relationship can save your skin or lead to your downfall. Honesty is one option, lying is another. How many betrayals can you accept before ending your friendship?

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/multiplayer-turn-based-roguelike-game-another-door-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
